transforms.code:
rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value) or []
	opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.locationOptions) or []
	out = []
	for i, r in enumerate(rows):
		r = r or {}
		out.append({'rowIndex': i, 'row': r, 'locationOptions': opts})
	return out

customMethods.name: load
handleSave
handleDiscard
customMethods.script:
selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": {"rows": [dict(r) for r in (selected.get("rows") or [])]}}

customMethods.name: addRow
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.editDraft) or {"rows": []})
	rows = list(draft.get("rows") or [])
	rows.append({
		"id":                  None,
		"locationId":          None,
		"locationLabel":       "",
		"locationTierOrdinal": None,
		"isConsumptionPoint":  False,
		"minQuantity":         None,
		"maxQuantity":         None,
		"defaultQuantity":     None,
	})
	draft["rows"] = rows
	selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": draft}

customMethods.name: _applyLocationChange
_applyConsumptionChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.editDraft) or {"rows": []})
	rows = list(draft.get("rows") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(rows):
		return
	row = dict(rows[idx])
	row["isConsumptionPoint"] = bool(isConsumptionPoint)
	if not row["isConsumptionPoint"]:
		row["minQuantity"] = None
		row["maxQuantity"] = None
		row["defaultQuantity"] = None
	rows[idx] = row
	draft["rows"] = rows
	selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": draft}

customMethods.name: _applyQtyChange
_removeRow

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyLocationChange(idx, payload.get("newLocationId"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyConsumptionChange(idx, payload.get("isConsumptionPoint"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyQtyChange(idx, payload.get("field"), payload.get("newValue"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeRow(idx)
